## Have you checked all of these?

### Data Only release
- [ ] Update data release notes
- [ ] Add new vignettes
- [ ] Edit hardcoded vignette counts
  
### Code release
- [ ] Update code release notes
- [ ] Add new vignettes
- [ ] Edit Man pages
- [ ] Update API page
   
### Other
- [ ] Personnel list
- [ ] ETL image
